overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a vibrant autumn forest at night. The character travels along a winding dirt path surrounded by golden-yellow foliage against a deep blue starry sky, passing rock formations and dense woodland areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with grassy verges

agents.ego_description: samurai character in traditional armor walking steadily along the forest path, sword visible at hip

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail covered with scattered fallen leaves
grass-covered mound flanking the left side of the path
tall trees with bright golden-yellow foliage lining both sides of the trail
deep dark blue night sky with visible stars and faint pink horizon hues

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along an open forest trail flanked by grassy hillsides. Golden autumn trees line the path under a clear starry night sky, with the camera following steadily from behind.

events.description: passing large gray boulder formations on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the forest becomes denser and rock formations appear

entered.detail: massive gray rock formation beside the path with weathered surface
traditional stone marker structure visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a denser forest section where large gray boulders appear on the right. The grassy hillsides fall behind as the path becomes more enclosed by golden foliage, and a stone shrine marker becomes visible ahead on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest cathedral with overhead canopy

events.description: passing the stone shrine lantern marker on the left side of the path
camera tilts upward to view the dense golden canopy overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the dense forest and observing the golden canopy above

entered.detail: thick overhead cover of interlocking golden autumn leaves creating a cathedral-like ceiling

segments.scene_description: The samurai enters a densely wooded area where the trees form a complete golden canopy overhead. After passing the stone shrine marker, the camera tilts upward to capture the breathtaking view of the golden leaves against the night sky, creating an immersive forest cathedral atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open autumn trail that gradually transforms into a dense, enclosed forest cathedral. It begins with the samurai walking along a wide path flanked by grassy hillsides under a clear, starry night sky. As the trail narrows, the open hillsides give way to a denser woodland where large gray boulders emerge on the right and a stone shrine marker appears on the left. The scene then shifts into a heavily wooded area where the golden foliage closes in to form a complete canopy overhead. Finally, after passing the shrine, the camera tilts upward to reveal the breathtaking contrast of the glowing yellow leaves against the deep blue of the night sky.
